combined_text: 10 reasons to visit Slovenia in 2015 (and beyond) "10 reasons to visit Slovenia in 2015 (and beyond)Anita Isalska, for CNN • Updated 4th March 2015Facebook Twitter Email (CNN) — Slovenia's star is rising in 2015.
